1.0.1.en: updated description, readme and images for better compliance with App Store guideluines

1.0.2.en: Added community forum link for support and feedback.

1.1.0.en: Batch GET polling for improved performance, configurable poll interval per device (5-60 seconds), volume standardised to percentage (0-100%) throughout the app

1.1.1.en: Improved combined Turn On card: confirmation polling, mute during startup to prevent audio bleed. Updated README with region-specific brand mentions.

1.2.0.en: Added OKTIV branding alongside UNDOK throughout the app. Fixed erratic behaviour of combined flow card 'Turn on, source, preset and volume'. Added WHEN card 'Now playing changed'.

1.2.1.en: Minor text changes. Added donate link.
